data.title: Y4Trade launches trading platform with 200+ fiat withdrawal options in Prague, July 4, 2025.
data.description: On July 4, 2025, in Prague, Y4Trade, a proprietary trading company, unveiled its new trading platform aimed at providing traders with a way to secure funding through a unique web and mobile application. The firm's headquarters in Prague will serve as the hub for this initiative, which seeks to empower traders by facilitating access to capital. The platform is tailored to offer a seamless experience for users seeking financial backing for their trading activities. With a strong commitment to advancing the trading community, Y4Trade aims to revolutionize the way traders approach funding opportunities through its innovative platform.

data.title: China launching exhibition & documentaries for 80th anniversary of victory against Japanese aggression & fascism.
data.description: In Beijing on July 4, 2025, China will host a special exhibition starting on July 7 to mark the 80th anniversary of the Chinese People's War of Resistance Against Japanese Aggression and the World Anti-Fascist War. This exhibition is significant in remembering the historical event and honoring those involved. The exhibition will feature various artifacts and displays to educate visitors about the war's impact and significance. This event is expected to attract a large number of attendees and generate significant interest both domestically and internationally.

data.title: Earnings reports for July 4, 2025, released by various companies before and after markets close. Visit Benzinga.com for full details.
data.description: Before the market opens, several companies are expected to report their earnings, while after the market closes, other companies are also set to release their financial reports. Detailed information can be found on a financial news website called Benzinga.com.

data.title: Sinopec launches China's first floating offshore PV project in Qingdao, aiming to advance green energy innovation.
data.description: On July 4, 2025, in QINGDAO, China, China Petroleum & Chemical Corporation (HKG: 0386, known as "Sinopec") collaborated with Shandong Province and Qingdao Municipality to launch China's inaugural commercial floating offshore photovoltaic (PV) project. This project is a significant milestone in the renewable energy sector and underlines the growing partnership between the energy industry and local governments.

data.title: UMC reports June 2025 sales of NT$18,823,070 (7.26% Y/Y increase). Jan-June 2025 sales were NT$116,616,614 (4.65% Y/Y change).
data.description: In June 2025, United Microelectronics Corporation (UMC) disclosed unaudited net sales, with revenues totaling NT$18,823,070. This marked a significant increase from June 2024, with a year-over-year change of NT$1,274,657 or 7.26%. For the period of January to June 2025, UMC reported total revenues of NT$116,616,614, showing a rise of NT$5,185,225 or 4.65% compared to the same period in 2024. These financial figures are all in thousands of New Taiwan Dollars (NT$). For more details about UMC, interested individuals can visit their website at https: (link not provided).

data.title: AB “Ignitis grupė” to select six new Supervisory Board members by July 24, 2025, as current term ends on October 25, 2025.
data.description: AB “Ignitis grupė” has reported that on July 4, 2025, the Ministry of Finance of the Republic of Lithuania, representing the majority shareholder, disclosed the appointment of six independent members to the Group’s Supervisory Board. The current Board's term concludes on October 25, 2025. Interested candidates have the opportunity to submit their applications by July 24, 2025.

data.title: MemeCore's $M token listed on major exchanges, trading since July 3, 2025, with celebratory campaigns.
data.description: On July 3, 2025, trading officially began for MemeCore's native token, $M, on various platforms. The company, known as the world's first Layer 1 blockchain tailored for the Meme 2.0 era, will be launching celebratory campaigns across different platforms.
